etymology.description: 火(火) (huǒ, 'fire') + 戌(戌) (xū, 'ninth month') = phonetic component for a sound resembling 'huǐ'
etymology.interpretation: 烕(烕) is created by combining the semantic component 火(火) (huǒ, 'fire') with the phonetic component 戌(戌) (xū, 'ninth month'). This combination represents a word related to fire with a pronunciation similar to 'huǐ'.
